sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13968" key="a)po/sxolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόσχολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n13968.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shunning the schools,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> Timo<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
